question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero questions. It dumps the entire solution in one turn with no engagement of the user.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are surfaced to the user. Subtleties like the 'and' rule and the 1000 boundary are stated, not problematized.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolding exists — the full answer (21,124) is revealed immediately. Maximum spoiler.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and well-organized, but it's a monologue followed by the student verifying alone. No back-and-forth dynamic.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
